description: Create a formal TCP State Machine Diagram in draw.io Desktop based on the RFC 793 reference found at '~/Desktop/tcp_states_rfc793.txt'. The diagram must be saved as '~/Desktop/tcp_state_machine.drawio' and contain two pages. Page 1, named 'Complete State Machine', must include all 11 standard TCP states (CLOSED, LISTEN, SYN_SENT, SYN_RECEIVED, ESTABLISHED, FIN_WAIT_1, FIN_WAIT_2, CLOSE_WAIT, CLOSING, LAST_ACK, TIME_WAIT) with labeled directional arrows for transitions as described in the reference. Use green for Connection Establishment transitions, red or orange for Teardown transitions, and include a legend explaining the color coding. Page 2, named 'Happy Path', should show a simplified diagram of the normal lifecycle (Establishment, Data Transfer, and Normal Close). Export Page 1 as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/tcp_state_machine.png'.
